steps.title: Identify the main topic
steps.content: The whole text is about a runestone discovered in Norway. The carbon dating and Elena Berg's view are details that explain the stone's age and possible importance.

steps.title: Reject supporting details
steps.content: Choice A is only a detail about dating. Choice C focuses on one scholar rather than the discovery. Choice D mentions battles, which are not discussed in the text. The answer is B.
